title: OpenAI Officially Launches Advertising Services in ChatGPT, Best Buy Among the First to Trial
excerpt: OpenAI has officially launched ad services in ChatGPT, marking the AI company's official entry into a new phase of commercial monetization. Advertisers can now
content_html:
OpenAI has officially launched ad services in ChatGPT, marking the AI company's official entry into a new phase of commercial monetization. Advertisers can now place ads within ChatGPT's conversation scenarios through dedicated ad management tools.

Differing from traditional keyword-based search engine ads, the ad targeting logic in ChatGPT is based on richer contextual signals. Users share more background information during conversations, allowing ads to be presented along the complete intent journey of "exploring options, comparing choices, and making decisions," rather than simply matching search terms.

The ad placement process consists of three steps: create an ad campaign and set budget and goals; batch upload or directly create ad details in the tool; after launching, measure results and continuously optimize. Currently, brands such as Best Buy, Lowe's, and VistaPrint have participated in testing as early advertisers. Amy Adams, Vice President of Media at Best Buy, said that consumers are increasingly turning to ChatGPT for research and decision-making, and "being present at these moments is crucial," expressing encouragement about early results.

OpenAI emphasized its cautious approach to ad placement, designing multiple trust mechanisms: ads are clearly identified in the experience, distinguished from ChatGPT's responses, and users can control how their data is used in ads. The company stated that the focus is on building an experience that is useful for advertisers while maintaining user trust in ChatGPT.

This move signifies that OpenAI is evolving ChatGPT from a pure conversation tool into a "conversation as commerce" platform. AI-native ad formats—built around dialogue, context, and real-time decision-making—may become a new variable in digital advertising.

sentences.zh: OpenAI正式在ChatGPT上线广告服务，标志着这家AI公司正式进入商业变现的新阶段。

sentences.en: Advertisers can now place ads within ChatGPT's conversation scenarios through dedicated ad management tools.
sentences.zh: 广告商现在可以通过专用的广告管理工具将广告放置在 ChatGPT 的对话场景中。

sentences.en: This move signifies that OpenAI is evolving ChatGPT from a pure conversation tool into a "conversation as commerce" platform.
sentences.zh: 此举标志着OpenAI正在将ChatGPT从纯粹的对话工具发展成为“对话即商业”平台。

sentences.en: AI-native ad formats—built around dialogue, context, and real-time decision-making—may become a new variable in digital advertising.
sentences.zh: 围绕对话、情境和实时决策构建的人工智能原生广告格式可能会成为数字广告的新变量。

content_html_zh:
OpenAI正式在ChatGPT上线广告服务，标志着这家AI公司正式进入商业变现的新阶段。 广告商现在可以通过专用的广告管理工具将广告放置在 ChatGPT 的对话场景中。

与传统的基于关键字的搜索引擎广告不同，ChatGPT 中的广告定位逻辑基于更丰富的上下文信号。 用户在对话期间分享更多背景信息，从而使广告能够沿着“探索选项、比较选择和做出决策”的完整意图旅程呈现，而不是简单地匹配搜索词。

广告投放流程包括三个步骤：创建广告活动并设定预算和目标；批量上传或直接在工具中创建广告详情；启动后，衡量结果并持续优化。 目前，百思买、Lowe's、VistaPrint等品牌已作为早期广告主参与测试。 百思买媒体副总裁 Amy Adams 表示，消费者越来越多地转向 ChatGPT 进行研究和决策，“在这些时刻的参与至关重要”，并对早期结果表示鼓励。

OpenAI强调其对广告投放的谨慎态度，设计了多种信任机制：广告在体验中被清晰识别，与ChatGPT的响应区分开来，用户可以控制其数据在广告中的使用方式。 该公司表示，重点是打造对广告商有用的体验，同时保持用户对 ChatGPT 的信任。

此举标志着OpenAI正在将ChatGPT从纯粹的对话工具发展成为“对话即商业”平台。 围绕对话、情境和实时决策构建的人工智能原生广告格式可能会成为数字广告的新变量。
